title: Dreaming of Key Not Working
description: Dreaming that a key is not working signifies mental blocks or unresolved issues.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: Freud would interpret an unworking key as a sign of locked away information or emotions within one's inner world. Jung might see this as a blockage in personal development.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: The subconscious is indicating that it's time to address locked or suppressed issues.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: Reflects feelings of inadequacy or failure when dealing with everyday stress or uncertainty.

interpretation: Symbolizes a feeling of being unable to resolve a specific issue or capitalize on an opportunity in your life.

context.positive: Opportunity to develop a new solution.
